name: Eaton / 伊顿
sector: Electrical equipment and power management / 电气设备与电力管理
summary: Eaton 提供电气设备、配电和电力管理方案，是 AI 数据中心电力接入和配电扩容的重要上游。 / Eaton provides electrical equipment, power distribution, and power-management solutions, making it an important upstream layer for AI data-center power access and distribution expansion.
summaryZh: Eaton 提供电气设备、配电和电力管理方案，是 AI 数据中心电力接入和配电扩容的重要上游。
summaryEn: Eaton provides electrical equipment, power distribution, and power-management solutions, making it an important upstream layer for AI data-center power access and distribution expansion.

business.description: 公司业务覆盖电气、美洲/全球电气、航空航天、车辆和 eMobility 等，数据中心电力需求是增量变量之一。 / The company spans electrical Americas/global, aerospace, vehicle, and eMobility businesses, with data-center power demand as one incremental variable.
business.descriptionZh: 公司业务覆盖电气、美洲/全球电气、航空航天、车辆和 eMobility 等，数据中心电力需求是增量变量之一。
business.descriptionEn: The company spans electrical Americas/global, aerospace, vehicle, and eMobility businesses, with data-center power demand as one incremental variable.
revenueModel: 配电与电力管理 / distribution and power management
工业与航空航天 / industrial and aerospace

business.thesis: AI 数据中心受电力接入、配电和可靠性约束时，Eaton 这类电力设备公司比下游应用更接近物理瓶颈。 / When AI data centers are constrained by power access, distribution, and reliability, power-equipment companies like Eaton sit closer to the physical bottleneck than downstream applications.
business.thesisZh: AI 数据中心受电力接入、配电和可靠性约束时，Eaton 这类电力设备公司比下游应用更接近物理瓶颈。
business.thesisEn: When AI data centers are constrained by power access, distribution, and reliability, power-equipment companies like Eaton sit closer to the physical bottleneck than downstream applications.
riskNotes: 数据中心订单占比和交付周期需持续核实。 / Data-center order exposure and delivery timing need ongoing verification.
工业周期、供应链成本和利率会影响利润率。 / Industrial cycles, supply-chain costs, and rates affect margins.

failureConditions.condition: AI 数据中心电力/散热订单或 backlog 没有继续改善。
failureConditions.conditionZh: AI 数据中心电力/散热订单或 backlog 没有继续改善。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if AI data-center power/cooling orders or backlog stop improving.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪订单、backlog、数据中心客户披露、交付周期和项目毛利率。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪订单、backlog、数据中心客户披露、交付周期和项目毛利率。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor orders, backlog, data-center customer disclosures, delivery lead times, and project margins.

failureConditions.condition: 电力接入和电网项目审批慢于数据中心建设需求。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 电力接入和电网项目审批慢于数据中心建设需求。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if grid interconnection and power projects lag data-center buildout needs.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪公用事业资本开支、项目审批、变压器/配电交付和客户开工节奏。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪公用事业资本开支、项目审批、变压器/配电交付和客户开工节奏。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor utility capex, project approvals, transformer/distribution delivery, and customer construction starts.

supplyChain.thesis: AI 数据中心受电力接入、配电和可靠性约束时，Eaton 这类电力设备公司比下游应用更接近物理瓶颈。 / When AI data centers are constrained by power access, distribution, and reliability, power-equipment companies like Eaton sit closer to the physical bottleneck than downstream applications.

supplyChain.thesisEn: When AI data centers are constrained by power access, distribution, and reliability, power-equipment companies like Eaton sit closer to the physical bottleneck than downstream applications.

scarceLayers.name: 数据中心电力接入与配电
scarceLayers.nameZh: 数据中心电力接入与配电
scarceLayers.whyScarce: AI 数据中心扩张需要可用电力、变压器、配电设备和工程交付，扩容周期往往长于服务器采购。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: AI 数据中心扩张需要可用电力、变压器、配电设备和工程交付，扩容周期往往长于服务器采购。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: AI data-center expansion requires available power, transformers, distribution equipment, and engineering delivery, often on longer cycles than server procurement.

themeExposure.rationale: 数据中心电力接入和配电扩容是 AI 基建的物理约束之一，Eaton 处于设备供给层。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: 数据中心电力接入和配电扩容是 AI 基建的物理约束之一，Eaton 处于设备供给层。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Data-center power access and distribution expansion are physical constraints for AI infrastructure, and Eaton sits in the equipment supply layer.
